sections.heading: Course overview
sections.markdown:
**Welcome to Lextures** is a guided, self-paced onboarding course. Every new account is enrolled automatically so you can learn the platform inside a real course — with modules, pages, quizzes, and assignments — not a separate product tour.

- **Estimated time:** 30–45 minutes if you read each page and try the linked activities
- **Format:** Seven short modules with a knowledge-check quiz at the end of each
- **Pace:** Work at your own speed; progress is saved as you go
- **Audience:** Students, homeschoolers, and instructors evaluating Lextures

[Open your course list](/courses) when you are ready to explore alongside this tour.

sections.heading: What you'll learn
sections.markdown:
By the end of this course, you will be able to:

1. **Navigate Lextures** — find courses, modules, and your dashboard
2. **Use everyday tools** — calendar, files, messaging, notebook, and announcements
3. **Understand how learning works** — adaptive paths, spaced practice, diagnostics, and mastery tracking
4. **Read your learner profile** — see how Lextures summarizes your learning patterns (when enabled)
5. **Learn on mobile** — install the app, work offline, and manage notifications
6. **Import from Canvas** — bring existing courses into Lextures (when your institution uses Canvas import)
7. **Track grades and finish** — understand auto-grading, the gradebook, and course completion

sections.heading: Module guide
sections.markdown:
Work through the modules in order. Each ends with a short auto-scored knowledge check.

| Module | What it covers |
|--------|----------------|
| **1. Welcome & Getting Oriented** | What Lextures is, your dashboard, and how courses are organized |
| **2. Core Features You'll Use Every Day** | Calendar, files, quizzes, assignments, messaging, notebook, and the course feed |
| **3. How Learning Works on Lextures** | Adaptive paths, spaced practice, diagnostics, mastery, and self-reflection |
| **4. Your Learner Profile** | What the profile shows, how to read it, and privacy controls |
| **5. Lextures on the Go (Mobile App)** | Installing the app, offline use, and push notifications |
| **6. Bringing Your Courses In (Canvas Import)** | When to import, what transfers, and how to verify results |
| **7. Grades, Assignments & Finishing Up** | Auto-grading, the gradebook, reflection, and completing the tour |

Some modules appear only when your institution has the related feature turned on.

sections.heading: Grading & completion
sections.markdown:
This course uses the same gradebook as any Lextures class.

- **Knowledge-check quizzes** are auto-scored; you get instant feedback after each module
- **Try-it assignments** award full credit when you submit a short confirmation (no instructor review)
- **Capstone reflection** in the final module is the main graded assignment

There are no fixed due dates — complete the modules when it suits you. When you finish the final knowledge check, you have completed the core walkthrough. A completion credential may be available when your institution enables it.

[View your grades](/courses) from any enrolled course.

sections.heading: Getting help
sections.markdown:
If you get stuck during the tour:

- Re-read the module you are on — pages link directly to the feature being taught
- Check [Settings](/settings/account) for account and notification preferences
- Visit the [Privacy Center](/privacy-centre) for data and privacy questions
- Return to this syllabus anytime for the full module outline

For institution-specific support (SSO, roster, or local policies), contact your school or organization's help desk.
